# AppOrbit - Web To APK Builder

AppOrbit is a powerful platform that allows users to turn any website into a beautiful, installable Android App (APK/AAB) in minutes without any coding required.

## Key Features
- **Web to APK/AAB Converter**: Instantly convert any URL to a fully functional Android app.
- **No Coding Required**: Simple interface to configure and build your app.
- **Push Notifications**: Engage users with built-in push notification support.
- **Offline Support**: Keep your app functional even without an internet connection.
- **Custom Branding**: Fully customize your app's name, icon, and splash screen.

## Important Links
- **Home**: [https://apporbit.in/](https://apporbit.in/)
- **Converter**: [https://apporbit.in/converter](https://apporbit.in/converter)
- **Pricing**: [https://apporbit.in/pricing](https://apporbit.in/pricing)
- **Features**: [https://apporbit.in/features](https://apporbit.in/features)
- **Privacy Policy**: [https://apporbit.in/privacy](https://apporbit.in/privacy)
- **Terms of Service**: [https://apporbit.in/terms](https://apporbit.in/terms)
- **Help Center**: [https://apporbit.in/help](https://apporbit.in/help)

## Technical Details
This platform is built using modern web technologies including React, Vite, TanStack Router, and Tailwind CSS.
